hub.title: Legal & information
hub.description: Policies, project information, and ways to reach us. Colabora is currently a test preview — use at your own risk; do not submit confidential data.

contact.rateLimited: Too many messages sent. Please wait a few minutes and try again.

consent.label: I accept the <termsLink>Terms of use</termsLink> and have read the <privacyLink>Privacy policy</privacyLink>. I understand this is a test environment: I use Colabora at my own risk and will not submit data I expect to stay private.
consent.required: You must accept the Terms and acknowledge the Privacy policy to create an account.
